name: ruby-activesupport
title: ruby-activesupport
summary: collection of utility classes used by the Rails framework
description:
collection of utility classes used by the Rails framework
Active Support is a collection of utility classes and standard library
extensions that were found useful for the Rails framework.
.
The classes reside in this package so they can be loaded as needed in
Ruby projects outside of Rails.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-activesupport because collection of utility classes used by the Rails framework.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-activesupport as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-activesupport with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-activesupport --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
